interaction_phrase: have entered a global strategic partnership
occurrence_sentence: HQS Quantum Simulation (HQS) and Alpine Quantum Technologies (AQT) have entered a global strategic partnership, according to a company release.

[HQS Quantum Simulation](https://quantumsimulations.de/) (HQS) and [Alpine Quantum Technologies](http://www.aqt.eu) (AQT) have entered a global strategic partnership, [according to a company release](https://quantumsimulations.de/news/2020/04/hqs-and-aqt-announce-a-strategic-partnership/).

interaction_phrase: provides its quantum computers as a backend to SCCE
occurrence_sentence: For its piece of the partnership, AQT provides its quantum computers as a backend to SCCE.

interaction_phrase: provides its quantum computers as a backend to SCCE
occurrence_sentence: For its piece of the partnership, AQT provides its quantum computers as a backend to SCCE.

interaction_phrase: work together offering a broad range of innovative applications
occurrence_sentence: Two European Start-ups, each a pioneer in its field, HQS Quantum Simulations, one of the top European Quantum Software Start-ups and AQT, one of the top Quantum Computing Hardware Providers can provide the solution and will work together offering a broad range of innovative applications in various fields of industry and academia.

interaction_phrase: Combining the theory and software experience of HQS with the hardware and engineering expertise of AQT
occurrence_sentence: "Combining the theory and software experience of HQS with the hardware and engineering expertise of AQT will significantly facilitate user- and application-driven progress in this field."

interaction_phrase: Two European Start-ups, each a pioneer in its field, HQS Quantum Simulations and AQT, can provide the solution and will work together
occurrence_sentence: Two European Start-ups, each a pioneer in its field, HQS Quantum Simulations, one of the top [European Quantum Software Start-ups](https://www.eu-startups.com/2019/07/10-european-startups-cooling-down-the-crazy-world-of-quantum-computing/) and AQT, one of the top [Quantum Computing Hardware Providers](https://medium.com/@cohen.sourcing/top-13-quantum-computing-hardware-providers-2906a40ef690) can provide the solution and will work together offering a broad range of innovative applications in various fields of industry and academia.

interaction_phrase: The collaboration allows customers direct access to quantum chemistry software solutions from HQS that can be immediately implemented on an AQT ion-trap quantum computer
occurrence_sentence: The collaboration allows customers direct access to quantum chemistry software solutions from HQS that can be immediately implemented on an AQT ion-trap quantum computer in Innsbruck, Austria, via Cirq.

interaction_phrase: quantum chemistry software solutions from HQS that can be immediately implemented on an AQT ion-trap quantum computer
occurrence_sentence: The collaboration allows customers direct access to quantum chemistry software solutions from HQS that can be immediately implemented on an AQT ion-trap quantum computer in Innsbruck, Austria, via Cirq.

occurrence_sentence: He has served as a writer, editor and analyst at The Quantum Insider since its inception.
